resemblance_definition: For each observed log10 feature, absolute distance to actual- and predicted-class medians is scaled by the corresponding class MAD. Positive delta means closer to the predicted-class median than to the actual-class median. This is descriptive, not SHAP.
scope_caveat: OOF error audit for the primary common-21 random forest. Citation/location metadata and class-median resemblance are for tracing and geological review, not causal attribution.
